programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Tiny House Nation

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Antonio Margarito
programme.desc: On January 24th, 2009 Shane Mosley and Antonio Margarito fought for WBA Super World Welterweight title at the Staples Center in Los Angeles with what was supposed to be a 12 round bout only went nine resulting in a victory for Mosley.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On June 17th, 2000 Shane Mosley faced Oscar De la Hoya for the first time for the IBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles the bout went a full 12 rounds ending with a split decision win for Mosley.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Wilfred Benitez
programme.desc: On November 30th, 1979 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Wilfred Benitez for the WBC World Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that went 15 rounds but ended in technical knockout giving the victory to Leonard.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Andre Gorges
programme.desc: On April 14th, 2012 Terence Crawford fought Andre Gorges at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas in a bout that was set for 6 round and lasted 5 with a win by knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Jose Benavidez Jr
programme.desc: On October 13th, 2018, Terence Crawford fought Jose Benavidez Jr for the WBO World Welterweight Title in Omaha, Nebraska. In a dominant performance, Crawford showed out in front of his hometown, delivering a TKO in the final round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Julius Indongo
programme.desc: On August 19th, 2017 Terence Crawford fought Julius Indongo for the IBF, WBA, WBC and WBO World Super Lightweight titles at the Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln the bout ended in the third round by knockout securing the victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Kell Brook
programme.desc: On November 14th, 2020 Terence Crawford battled Kell Brook for the WBO World Welterweight title in The Bubble at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a fourth round technical knockout victory for Crawford.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Shawn Porter
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Terence Crawford fought Shawn Porter for the WBO World Welterweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In a very close fight, Crawford turned it up and put on the pressure late, delivering a TKO in the 10th round.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Thomas Dulorme
programme.desc: On April 18th, 2015, Terence Crawford fought Thomas Dulorme for the WBO World Super Lightweight Title in Arlington, Texas. Putting on the pressure and showing his aggressive style, Crawford scored three knockdowns in the sixth round to get the TKO.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Viktor Postol
programme.desc: On July 23rd, 2016, Terence Crawford fought Viktor Postol for the WBO and WBC World Super Lightweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Scoring two knockdowns, Crawford dominated the fight, earning a much deserved unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Terence Crawford vs Yuriorkis Gamboa
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2014, Terence Crawford fought Yuriorkis Gamboa for the WBO Lightweight Title at Century Link Center in Omaha. In Top Rank's 2014 Fight of the Year, Terence Crawford shined in front of his hometown, stopping Gamboa in the ninth round.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Juan Domingo Roldan
programme.desc: On October 29th, 1987 Thomas Hearns faced Juan Domingo Roldan for the vacant WBC World Middleweight title at the Las Vegas Hilton the 12 round bout went only 4 rounds ending with a knockout by Hearns securing the victory.

programme.title: Thomas Hearns vs Roberto Duran
programme.desc: On June 15th, 1984 Thomas Hearns fought Roberto Duran for WBC World Super Welterweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas that resulted in a technical knockout victory in the second round by Hearns.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley vs Manny Pacquiao I
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Manny Pacquiao and Timothy Bradley started their trilogy at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a battle for the WBO World Welterweight title that ended in a split decision win for Timothy Bradley.

programme.title: Tommy Morrison vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On June 7th, 1993 Tommy Morrison battled George Foreman for the WBO world heavyweight title at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas with Foreman getting a point deducted in round ten the bout resulted in a victory for Morrison.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's three weeks into the winter season in Northern Alaska, and Carlile Transportation has only moved 500 of the 2,000 loads it needs to transport to the Prudhoe Bay oil fields. The clock is ticking and an arctic storm is brewing.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: A massive storm blows in and all traffic on the ice road comes to a standstill. And if wheels aren't turning, no one's earning. George, Tim, and Lisa take shelter at Coldfoot, the only truck stop on the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Another winter storm drops nearly a foot of fresh, new snow, obscuring the road south. Veteran driver Jack and the less experienced Lisa are determined to not lose any more time or money this season.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Washington, frustration boils over as Rygaard and Oakes are forced to share the same landing. Down in the bayou, Shelby gets in hot water with the law over a contested log.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: As the loggers close in on the end of the season, one log could be the difference between winning and losing, reeling in fortunes or coming up short.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: For 6 seasons, the Ax Men have been chasing huge paydays in the most dangerous conditions imaginable. Now, Season Seven is gearing up to be the toughest yet, and we're taking a look back at the logging legacies of the companies who have made it this far.

programme.title: Ax Men: Logged and Loaded
programme.desc: The crews of Ax Men are back and the race for green gold is on! In Washington, Rygaard pushes deep into their roughest terrain yet in an effort to recapture the title.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Phil discovers more beaver activity on the Robertson land, he recruits Jase, Jep, and Si to get rid of them. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie bring Bella to her first day of karate practice.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Stumped on a way to celebrate Willie's birthday, Korie enlists the guys' help and Jase takes the reigns in planning a trip to the lake where Phil and Kay used to live. Meanwhile, when the women realize a raccoon is inside the lake house.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie takes a business trip to Scotland to expand his duck call business, he brings the entire family along so they can reconnect with their Scottish roots. But when Willie organizes a bus tour to trace his family heritage.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A special holiday episode of Duck Dynasty shows when the Robertson family took over the Thanksgiving special of a local TV show "Good Morning Arklamiss." Each family member presents a special holiday segment, with Willie and Jase serving as anchormen.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie becomes the temporary owner of a thoroughbred, he and the guys take it to a local track and enter it into a race. Meanwhile, when Kay decides she wants to buy a new birdbath for her yard, she recruits Phil, Martin, and Godwin.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons help a long time employee whose Mom has fallen on hard times by buying her a brand new house for Christmas. Jep, Jase, Martin, and Godwin race to finish a deck in time for the big reveal, only to get sidetracked by a hammering competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase enters an outhouse race to help promote Willie's Duck Diner, but when the Robertsons show up for the race, they face an unexpected rival -- Phillip McMillan. Meanwhile, Willie attempts to create the world's greatest bologna sandwich.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie helps Sadie with her homework by enlisting the guys to create a real-life version of a math problem, but when Jase and Willie get sidetracked helping Sadie, they rekindle an old argument of whether Jase can outrun a truck.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Just five days into the Arctic adventure, Mother Nature is about to strike and wreak havoc on the ice roads. Making matters worse is a report of a trucker who has run off the road and is stranded on the weakest part.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: After the storm clears, most of the truckers are ready to roll--all except Rick, who is on the verge of quitting and looks to Hugh for advice. For a second time, Jerry attempts the MGM camp move, including the transport of an expensive 50-ton derrick.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit. With the all powerful Allspark, Megatron can use it to turn all of Earth's robots into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: While working on a space bridge, the Autobots and their leader, Optimus Prime, find the AllSpark. After an epic battle between their ship and Megatron, they crash land on Earth in the city of Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons. Eventually, the team assumes heroic roles in Detroit City.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Autobots must save Detroit from Starscream, when he kidnaps Bumblebee, Fanzone and Isaac Sumdac for ransom to get the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop. Meanwhile, Megatron's head comes back online and takes control of several robots to attack the Autobots and reclaim the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high... even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power. Using a molecule-freezing device to take Megatron and Starscream out of the picture, the two are free to lead how they see fit.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: The black hole expands even further and the crisis has approached Jungle Planet. Leobreaker and Snarl wager the leader's throne and challenge Scourge. Meanwhile Lori discovers an image that depicts the past when Giant Planet was concealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Although Scourge is the winner of the fight, Scourge's emotion causes him to hesitate. Among such, he encounters by chance Bud, who has formed the Mini-Con Recon Team. Meanwhile, the Cybertron Defense Team shifts into action and takes on Galvatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons finally reach the lowest depths of Giant Planet. Coby and Landmine head to the spaceship Lemuria where the Planet Key is located.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Starscream and Galvatron battle for possession of the Omega Lock and the four Planet Keys. Though the Autobots try to intervene, Soundwave and Sideways get in their way and hope to see the battle through to the end.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Wing Saber hurries to the space bridge in the sky. However, he was not there in time and the space bridge begins to fall apart due to the battle that had just occurred. Lori grieves that she cannot return to her home world.

programme.title: Transformers Beast Wars

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: This week, WOW - Women Of Wrestling shakes things up like never before! The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line in a Fatal Four Way Main Event Match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW - Women Of Wrestling ("WOW") showcases supreme athleticism, dramatic and inspiring stories, and is centered around empowering and uplifting women that are branded the "WOW Superheroes."

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Buckle up for another mother vs. daughter showdown as the WOW World Championship Tag Team Titles are up for grabs!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miami's Sweet Heat, Lovely Laurie and Lucious Lindsey Carlson, set out to prove that they can achieve WOW Tag Team Champion status without Lana Star, but first they must score a victory over Tormenta and Princess Aussie.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In a Triple Threat showdown, matchmaker, David McLane pits Santana Garrett, Genesis and Paola Mayfield against one another for a shot at taking the championship title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's a WOW World Championship Tag Team Title Match! No. 1 contenders, Tormenta and Princess Aussie, collide with reigning champs Penelope Pink and Holly Swag, who are presented by The Fabulous Lana Star.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW World Champion, The 6'2 Classmaster issues a bold challenge to the WOW roster that leads to a shocking opening match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miami's Sweet Heat, Lovely Laurie and Lucious Lindsey CArlson, throw their sisterly respect out the window when Lana Star pits the feuding sisters against one another in an attempt to flush the animosity that has infected the Fab Four family.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Ashley Blaze is injured, Kara Kai recruits the Mighty Mights' Sugar and the Albanian Grappler Xena Phoenix, who are primed to take down the tyrant trio of Top Tier. For Kara Kai, it's not about a title, it's a personal grudge match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Having faced each other in the ring before, the stakes are higher as Australian warriors Genesis and Princess Aussie take to the ring to prove who's really queen of the Outback.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miami's Sweet Heat, Lovely Laurie and Lucious Lindsey Carlson, carry out a campaign of revenge against their once manager Lana Star and her deceitful divas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's a clash of the titans in tonight's Main Event as Superhero Santana Garrett gets her big chance to face IQ Superior Samantha Smart's mentee, The Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gabriella Cruz is a force to be reckoned with, and she vows to crucify the competition; Fury welcomes the Brazilian bombshell to the WOW roster in singles action.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While Dojo Defenders' Tara Strike recoups, Kara Kai squares off against Animal Instinct's Katarina Jinx.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A gunslinger en route to Durango seeks Doc Holliday to gun him down for the murder of his brother. Passing through Tombstone, he becomes the enemy of two of the West's slickest draws -- Sheriff Hollister and the infamous dentist-turned-gunman.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: A handsome cowboy makes eyes at an immigrant miner's pretty daughter and upsets her staid European ideals. Betrothed by her father to a young miner, she forsakes him and her old-world traditions by leaving home to become an 'American lady.'

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: George and Patricia Camden, two people out of rancher Aaron McClain's shady past, blackmail him. Aided by a mysterious accomplice, McClain evens the score by murdering George, and Sheriff Hollister is plunged into a dangerous manhunt.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Old Man Clinton forces Bill Doolin - just out of prison - into an attempt to kill Sheriff Clay Hollister as Clay is the only witness against his two renegade sons. Dooline picks a fight with Clay who risks his life to get to the bottom of the plot.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Julie Dixon takes a job as a dealer in Tombstone's Saloon. Here, she deals a grim hand of vengeance. Her brother Sam, an incurable gambler, had killed Julie's lover six months before. She has taken the job as part of a plan to wreak revenge on Sam.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Convicted of murder, Vince Harper breaks jail and seeks refuge with an old friend: Editor Claibourne. Believing in Harper's innocence, the editor agrees to hide him until he can uncover new evidence, leading Sheriff Hollister to strike a deal.

programme.desc: After an iCarly fan proposes to his girlfriend live on the web show, the gang gets roped into going to the wedding. But when the bride gets cold feet, Carly must come to the rescue.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang goes into business making and selling Penny-Tees. After sales go through the roof, Sam recruits 4th-graders to help make shirts. But Carly, Sam, & Freddie disagree about how to treat them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Ridiculed for never pulling a prank, Carly recruits Spencer's help to prank Sam and Freddie. But after Spencer gets a taste for it, he can't stop pranking. The gang must figure out how to stop him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After fighting with her mom, Sam moves in with Carly, who soon realizes she's a horrible guest. Freddie is stalked by a dangerous criminal after catching him on video committing a crime.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When a video of Nevel yelling at a little girl surfaces on the internet, Nevel becomes hated by everyone. After celebrating Nevel's demise, the iCarly gang then works to restore his honor after Nevel begs them for help.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang decides to hire an intern for the web series. Carly and Sam hire a guy they think is cute, but the new intern proves to be more trouble than he's worth. Freddy has to prove to Carly and Sam that they're better off without him.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The gang spends the night finishing their projects at Ridgeway during the annual school lock-in. Carly and Freddie start to suspect that Sam might have a crush on their new friend Brad.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iPilot: When Miss Briggs rejects all their favorite contestants from talent show tryouts, Carly and Sam decide to host their talented classmates on their own online web show, iCarly.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iLike Jake: Carly has a crush on a boy at school named Jake. He's really cool and hot. Since Carly likes him, she invites Jake to sing and play guitar on her web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWant More Viewers: Carly and Sam compete against Freddie and Spencer to see who can come up with the best plan to get more kids to watch the iCarly webcast.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly, Sam, and Freddie want their web show to be reviewed by "Nevelocity," a really popular website that reviews other websites and webcasts.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWanna Stay With Spencer: Carly and Spencer's granddad makes a surprise visit. He's very concerned that Spencer is too irresponsible and wacky to be Carly's guardian. It's up to Carly and her friends to prove to her granddad that Spencer is capable.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSpy a Mean Teacher: Carly decides to do a webcast showing what mean teachers do when they're not in school. They decide to follow their mean teacher but find themselves in serious trouble when they accidentally get trapped at her apartment.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWant a World Record: Carly, Sam, and Freddie try to break the world record for the longest continuous webcast. To do so, iCarly will have to run for over 24 hours straight.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iWill Date Freddie: An iCarly fan, Valerie, asks Freddie on a date. The date goes so well that Freddie begins filming Valerie's own web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHeart Art: Carly invites Spencer's art hero, Harry Joyner, to take a look at Spencer's work. When Harry calls Spencer's work amateurish, Spencer feels like his life has lost its purpose.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iAm Your Biggest Fan: iCarly's biggest fan, Mandy, is invited onto the show as a one-girl studio audience. Mandy turns out to be more of a stalker than a fan and the kids have to get rid of her.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iSaw Him First: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iOwe You: Sam is insulted when Freddie accuses her of not paying him and Carly back any of the money she's constantly borrowing.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iHurt Lewbert: A "Messing With Lewbert" sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman.
